## Summary

## Type
<!-- pick one -->
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI

## Checklist
- [ ] `go build ./...` passes locally
- [ ] User-facing strings go through `T()` (i18n)
- [ ] If new flag/subcommand: `const usage` updated and completion scripts updated (`completion.go`)
- [ ] If user-visible: README and/or CLAUDE.md updated

## Testing
<!-- how you verified the change works -->
